title: campylanthus parviflorus
intro: Campylanthus parviflorus, also known as dwarf snapdragon or small-flowered Campylanthus, is a small perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, Campylanthus parviflorus has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities that can help protect against infections and oxidative stress. Campylanthus parviflorus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
